channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Sofa bed large bin chair mattress, 8th July
item.description:
These are on the path at the bottom off lessons hill there appears to be more and more rubbish every week dumped in and around this area

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Millfields Close, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox in garden gate, 8th July
item.description:
Dead fox in garden gate of 14 Kashmir road please

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kashmir Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Commercial rubbish dumped in the street., 8th July
item.description:
I see this issue was reported in February and resolved. I have noted it regularly for the past six months. Shop waste, bin bags, stacked around the public bin, blocking the bike parking spot.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 70, Denmark Hill, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead animal, 8th July
item.description:
I reported this last week and received an email to say it’s been sorted, clearly it’s not!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brook Street, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter cans bottles, 8th July
item.description:
Lots of litter again Pickford lane parade in kerbs over shopfronts. Bins full to the brim cans bottles over pavements. Lots of build up in Pickford close in road Do you ever sweep? I have sent a note to councillor Janice ward Wilson as back up as the litter I has. It been picked up or swept. Glass and can by the bus stop in the kerbs.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pickford Lane, West Heath, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 8th July
item.description:
Finally, an idiot who thinks it is okay to fly tip that has left their details on the rubbish - do something meaningful Bromley council and fine this individual.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Royston Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Deceased goose in small wildlife park, 8th July
item.description:
Found this goose at 4pm inside The Tarn wildlife park, 133 Court Road. It’s at the edge of the water.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Court Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gas cylinder/bottle outside on pavement, 8th July
item.description:
Gas cylinder/bottle outside on pavement
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-12, Grove Lane, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Disruptive parking, taking two slots, 8th July
item.description:
This van parked on two slots in a residential parking area, the drivers are not recognised as residents in the nearby block. This van has been parking in this area for the past few weeks, either playing loud music or occupying extra space, this is anti social behaviour that needs to be stopped.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sheldon Avenue, Muswell Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of broken glass in parking bays, 8th July
item.description:
Broken glass covering several parking bays outside post office
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Glengall Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped rotting food and flies, 8th July
item.description:
A shopping trolley of rubbish was dumped outside our flat, the shopping trolley has disappeared but the rubbish is rotting and covered in flies - we had a rat problem before so please help! Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sportsbank Street, Catford South, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter, cans, bottles, coffee cups and rubbish eg paper, 8th July
item.description:
The street is unkempt, kerbs not weeded, broken glass and cans and bottles everywhere
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wenlock Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cardboard and packaging left on the pavement, 8th July
item.description:
This has been here since the weekend

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Franklin Road, Upper Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegal parking, 8th July
item.description:
B

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Old Jamaica Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car parked on footpath, 8th July
item.description:
Greenwich you need to start fining these reports. Lewisham does. Car parked on footpath at 6pm on busy day

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Greenwich High Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Continuous Flytipping under these trees, 8th July
item.description:
There is constant flytipped waste found under these trees. This is caused by the fact that parking is blocked by a lamppost blocking anyone parking over the spot. This leaves it an ideal place.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 152, Leesons Hill, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Water leak⁰, 8th July
item.description:
Water leak in road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bramley Road, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A NCIL Daily Survey problem has been found, 8th July
item.description:
A NCIL Daily Survey problem has been found by Brent Council

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Granville Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown trees in verge, 8th July
item.description:
All the trees in this verge are very overgrown. Lots of them are touching the telephone lines. This entire area should be trimmed
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 177, Leesons Hill, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: All the grass on the even house number side needs cutting, 8th July
item.description:
Lots of overgrown grass in this area. I understand that it is up steps however this is public property and so should be maintained by the council.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 134, Leesons Hill, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
